# Weather Lookup

This skill helps you check the current weather for any location.

## Usage

Ask the agent to check the weather for a city name. The agent will
use the weather API to fetch current conditions and return a summary
including temperature, humidity, and wind speed.

## Example

> What's the weather in San Francisco?

The agent will respond with current conditions from the weather service.
